title: Feature Request: optional PIN board controls row to top of screen (search, “New Item”, person, filter, etc)
excerpt: A simple one, for optimal usability that is needed on a regular basis: it would be a HUGE help if the board control row just above the items could be pinned so it’s always visible as you scroll down the board. Thanks!

posts.author: MonDude (MonDude)
posts.cookedHtml: A simple one, for optimal usability that is needed on a regular basis: it would be a HUGE help if the board control row just above the items could be pinned so it’s always visible as you scroll down the board. Thanks!

posts.author: Kaz (Carl Rhoades)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re talking about this one, right?:

Annotation 2020-08-25 162435933×46 4.71 KB

This would be especially great for really long boards!

posts.author: dplcharlotte (Charlotte Turner)
posts.cookedHtml: @MonDude this is exactly what I need as well! I have some quite lengthy boards which I often use the search feature at the top but if i’ve scrolled down a board, I then have to keep scrolling all the way to the top to use the search feature again. Brilliant request, I’m sure this would help many others.
